Sage Bot Item Code: A88


Other locations the gear can be found

Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Mystic Pumpkin

Triggers: Once in a while

Summons a mystic storm cloud for 6 sec. The storm cloud drops burning pumpkins that hit random enemies 6 times. Each pumpkin deals up to 8000 damage depending on how far the enemy is from the artifact wearer. The greater the distance, the greater the damage. Also, the artifact wearer restores 11500 own health per each pumpkin that has hit an enemy.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
